title: Diagrams
summary: Feature parent for authored document diagrams in Docs Viewer.
content_html:
Diagrams

Purpose

Add useful authored diagrams to Docs Viewer.

Feature Documents

  • Concept — authored-diagram purpose, settled toolchain and render decisions, workflows, and invariants.
  • Delivery — the complete Mermaid intake, build, watcher, external-editor, proof-document, and verification boundary.
  • Docs Viewer Roadmap — relative importance and promotion into a finishable delivery.

Status

  • The feature is shipped. DIA-1 established the locked Mermaid CLI toolchain and registered provider-neutral producer; DIA-2 registered Studio source and connected full and targeted builds; DIA-3 shipped staged author intake, rendered source links, and changed-identity watcher rendering; DIA-4 shipped the proof documents and durable workflow guidance.
  • Staged .mmd intake uses Add image…, backed by the repository-pinned Mermaid CLI and one registered producer for interactive, targeted-document, watcher, and full Docs builds.
  • The source/publication refactor established the convention: canonical .mmd belongs in configured source media/mermaid/, and derived SVG is written directly to that scope's configured published svg location.
  • Studio now configures media/mermaid/ as source for the registered mermaid producer. Full builds render every configured source; targeted document builds render only Mermaid-backed SVG identities referenced by the selected documents before their payloads.
  • Add image… now accepts staged .mmd, renders before configured writes, retains the staged source, copies verified canonical source into configured media/mermaid/, publishes the verified SVG, and inserts only its SVG token into the dirty Markdown buffer.
  • Rendered manage-mode Document Info lists verified Mermaid-backed SVG sources through logical Open in VS Code actions. Source-mode info remains the semantic-token picker, and the watcher renders only a changed Mermaid identity.
  • Configuration And Extension Points and Docs Import contain the first accessible, scope-owned proof diagrams. Rendered Document Info links their verified Mermaid sources to VS Code; source-mode info remains semantic-token search.
  • The proof diagrams did not expose a Mermaid limitation requiring D2 support.
